Church CMS Favicon Pack
=======================
Color Palette: Natural & Serene
- Forest Green:  #3A6B4A (background)
- Warm Beige:    #F5EDD6 (church building)
- Aged Gold:     #C8A45A (cross)
- Sage Green:    #A8C9A0 (windows)

Files Included:
- favicon.svg          Scalable vector (use anywhere)
- favicon.ico          Multi-size .ico (16, 32, 48px) for browsers
- favicon-16x16.png    Browser tab
- favicon-32x32.png    Browser tab (retina)
- favicon-48x48.png    Windows shortcut
- favicon-64x64.png    General use
- favicon-128x128.png  Chrome Web Store / general
- favicon-180x180.png  Apple Touch Icon (iOS home screen)
- favicon-192x192.png  Android / PWA
- favicon-512x512.png  PWA splash screen

Usage (HTML <head>):
  <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/favicon.ico">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/favicon-180x180.png">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="/favicon-32x32.png">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="/favicon-16x16.png">
